name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new calculation mode, reference, or platform support

labels: ["enhancement", "needs-triage"]

<!-- One sentence. -->

## Why?

<!-- What problem does it solve? Which user? -->

<!-- Pseudocode, math, or a worked example. -->

## Which surface?

- [ ] New engine mode (in `astro_engine.py`)
- [ ] New MCP tool (in `mcp_server.py`)
- [ ] New REST endpoint (in `api.py`)
- [ ] New OpenAPI path
- [ ] New reference text
- [ ] Documentation only

## Willing to PR?

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to implement this
- [ ] Yes, with guidance
- [ ] No, hoping someone else picks it up
